title: cardamine amara subsp. austriaca
intro: Cardamine amara subsp. austriaca, also known as the Alpine Bittercress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it has been employed to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cardamine amara subsp. austriaca are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
